title: Cricket SA confirms national youth tournaments
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - Cricket South Africa (CSA) has confirmed the dates for its annual youth tournaments that will be hosted in December.


> The Garden Route Badgers will enter teams in all of them.


The dates are:

• 8-13 December: CSA Girls U16 Week in Gqeberha

• 9-14 December: CSA Boys U16 Week in Paarl

• 15-20 December: CSA Girls U19 Week in Potchefstroom

• 16-21 December: CSA U19 Khaya Majola Week in Bloemfontein.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
